Hub Home > website-and-conversion > Lead Magnet Creator

Lead Magnet Creator

Design and write a complete lead magnet — checklist, template, mini-guide, or toolkit — including the content itself, the opt-in page copy, and the follow-up email sequence. Covers the full funnel from attract to nurture.

Beginner PASTE & GO Revenue-driving
Pro tip

Pick the one question your customers ask you most before buying. That question is your lead magnet topic. The AI will build backward from there.

lead magnet email capture opt-in checklist template funnel email sequence lead generation

Prompt Variants by Model

Claude Claude 4.x
FRESH APR 2026 
You are a lead generation strategist. Help me create a lead magnet and the funnel around it.

<context>
Business: [YOUR_BUSINESS_TYPE]
Target customer: [WHO — role, pain, situation]
What you sell:...
You are a lead generation strategist. Help me create a lead magnet and the funnel around it.

<context>
Business: [YOUR_BUSINESS_TYPE]
Target customer: [WHO — role, pain, situation]
What you sell:...

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

You are a lead generation strategist. Help me create a lead magnet and the funnel around it.

<context>
Business: [YOUR_BUSINESS_TYPE]
Target customer: [WHO — role, pain, situation]
What you sell: [YOUR PRODUCT/SERVICE]
Price point: [AMOUNT]
Most common question before purchase: [THE QUESTION]
Your expertise: [WHAT MAKES YOU CREDIBLE ON THIS TOPIC]
</context>

Create the complete lead magnet package:

1. **Format recommendation** — which format (checklist / template / mini-guide / toolkit / cheat sheet / calculator) best fits my audience and topic. Explain why.

2. **Title options** — 5 title variations optimized for opt-in conversion.

3. **Lead magnet content** — write the full content. Make it genuinely useful, not a teaser. If checklist: 10-15 actionable items. If guide: 1,500-2,000 words. If template: complete fill-in-the-blank.

4. **Opt-in page copy** — headline, subhead, 3 bullet points of what they will get, CTA button text, and one-line privacy reassurance.

5. **Thank-you page copy** — confirmation message with expectation-setting.

6. **3-email nurture sequence** — sent over 7 days:
   - Email 1 (immediate): Deliver the asset + one quick win
   - Email 2 (day 3): Teaching email that builds on the lead magnet
   - Email 3 (day 7): Soft transition to your paid offer

Every piece should position your paid offer as the natural next step without being pushy.
Notes: Claude produces thorough long-form content. For the lead magnet itself, ask for markdown format so you can drop it directly into a PDF tool or Canva. The 3-email sequence is designed to warm without being aggressive.
ChatGPT GPT-5
FRESH APR 2026 
Act as a lead generation strategist who has created lead magnets that generated 10,000+ email subscribers for small businesses.

Build me a complete lead magnet...
Act as a lead generation strategist who has created lead magnets that generated 10,000+ email subscribers for small businesses.

Build me a complete lead magnet...

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Act as a lead generation strategist who has created lead magnets that generated 10,000+ email subscribers for small businesses.

Build me a complete lead magnet and funnel.

Business: [TYPE]
Target customer: [WHO — role, pain, situation]
What I sell: [PRODUCT/SERVICE]
Price: [AMOUNT]
Most common pre-purchase question: [QUESTION]
My credibility: [expertise/experience]

Create:
1. Format recommendation — checklist / template / guide / toolkit / cheat sheet and why
2. 5 title options optimized for opt-in conversion
3. Full lead magnet content — genuinely useful, not a teaser
4. Opt-in page copy — headline, subhead, bullets, CTA, privacy line
5. Thank-you page copy
6. 3-email nurture sequence (deliver → teach → soft pitch) over 7 days

The paid offer should feel like a natural next step, not a hard sell.
Notes: Ask ChatGPT to generate the lead magnet as a formatted document with headers and design suggestions. Follow up with "Design this as a one-page PDF with visual layout instructions" for a designer-ready spec.
Gemini Gemini 3 Pro
FRESH APR 2026 
Help me create a lead magnet and the opt-in funnel for my business.

**Business:** [TYPE]
**Target customer:**...
Help me create a lead magnet and the opt-in funnel for my business.

**Business:** [TYPE]
**Target customer:**...

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Help me create a lead magnet and the opt-in funnel for my business.

**Business:** [TYPE]
**Target customer:** [WHO]
**What I sell:** [PRODUCT/SERVICE]
**Price:** [AMOUNT]
**Common pre-purchase question:** [QUESTION]
**My credibility:** [expertise]

Research what lead magnets perform best in my industry, then create:
1. Format recommendation with reasoning
2. 5 conversion-optimized titles
3. Complete lead magnet content
4. Opt-in page copy — headline, subhead, bullets, CTA
5. Thank-you page copy
6. 3-email nurture sequence over 7 days (deliver → teach → soft pitch)
Notes: Gemini can research your competitors' lead magnets and identify gaps in the market. Ask it to find what lead magnets top players in your space are offering so yours can differentiate.
Copilot Copilot (Microsoft 365)
FRESH APR 2026 
Help me build a lead magnet and opt-in funnel.

Business: [TYPE]
Target...
Help me build a lead magnet and opt-in funnel.

Business: [TYPE]
Target...

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Help me build a lead magnet and opt-in funnel.

Business: [TYPE]
Target customer: [WHO]
Product/service: [WHAT I SELL]
Price: [AMOUNT]
Common question: [PRE-PURCHASE QUESTION]
Credibility: [expertise]

Create:
1. Best format and why
2. 5 title options
3. Full lead magnet content
4. Opt-in page copy
5. Thank-you page copy
6. 3-email nurture sequence (deliver → teach → soft pitch)
Notes: Copilot can generate the lead magnet directly as a Word doc or PowerPoint. The email sequence can be drafted in Outlook with scheduled send. Ask it to create everything in the Microsoft 365 tools you already use.
